candidate.description: Hierarchical Navigable Small World graph index for approximate nearest-neighbor search over high-dimensional embeddings.

candidates_full.full_description: General graph data structure: vertices, edges, traversals; foundation for many algorithms but not specifically about ANN search.
Data structures accelerating data retrieval (B-tree, hash, GIN, GiST, ANN indexes such as HNSW).
Reducing feature count via projection or quantization; related to ANN search through compressed representations.
